overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist exploring a shallow wetland forest with massive ancient skeletal remains. The character walks through lily-pad covered water surrounded by lush green trees and giant arching rib bones under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow forest wetland with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water surrounded by dense forest and large rock formations

entered.detail: tall leafy trees with thick trunks surrounding the wetland area
large gray rocky outcrop with moss covering the surface
snow-capped mountain peak visible through the tree canopy
stone tower with golden roof visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shallow wetland forest surrounded by dense green foliage. A large rock cliff dominates the left side while distant mountains peek through the trees. The water is covered with floating vegetation as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient giant skeleton burial ground in open wetland

events.description: massive giant rib bones become visible as the forest opens into a clearing

agents.ego_description: walking around and between the massive skeletal remains of a giant creature

entered.detail: massive curved rib bones arching high out of the water and ground
skeletal remains of a giant creature scattered across the grassy mound
pink and white lily pads floating in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide clearing dominated by massive ancient skeletal remains. Giant rib bones arch overhead like monuments while the character walks around the central skeleton. The forest trees recede to the sides as water lilies become visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wetland with giant rib bone monuments

events.description: character stops walking and pans camera to survey the massive rib bones and landscape

agents.ego_description: standing still in the water while panning the camera to observe the surrounding giant bones and distant mountains

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking to stand in the shallow water and pan the camera across the landscape. The giant rib bones frame the view on both sides while the camera reveals distant mountains and a prominent tree on the right. Sunlight creates a lens flare as the scene focuses on the monumental scale of the ancient remains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense wetland forest that gradually opens into a monumental clearing of ancient skeletal remains. It begins with the character walking through shallow water and thick green foliage, passing a large rock cliff on the left with distant mountains visible through the trees. As the character moves forward, the forest recedes to the sides and the scene expands into a wide clearing where giant rib bones arch overhead like monuments. The camera then slows to a stop in the lily-pad covered water, panning across the landscape to frame the massive bones against the distant mountains and a prominent tree. Finally, the view settles on the scale of the remains as bright sunlight creates a lens flare across the open vista.
